node: M4 manager (Claude Opus) — scoped to mission M4 offline core
directive: Implement Phase-1 of the ask-chatgpt v2 rewrite: the OFFLINE CORE, TDD against the mock channel, to team/evidence/reports/M3-detailed-design.md §10 M4 steps 1-6. Offline only. Acceptance = GREEN `uv run pytest` with FALSIFIABLE tests + inspected artifacts (never exit codes alone). Commit increments to rewrite-v2 (no push, no Co-Authored-By).
authoritative_design: team/evidence/reports/M3-detailed-design.md (790 lines; §2 module signatures, §3 JSONL/layout/linearization, §4 capture, §5 completion, §6 send, §8 CLI, §9 errors, §10 M4 steps 1-6 = build plan + acceptance).
worker_preamble: team/contracts/M4-common.md (shared safety/dispatch/TDD/commit discipline — every worker reads it in full; workers inherit nothing).
constraints: Branch rewrite-v2 ONLY. NEVER move/commit/merge/checkout/fast-forward `stable` (must stay 779eb40).
NEVER `uv tool install`/`uv tool upgrade`/`--reinstall` (mutates operator's separately-installed running tool another agent is using). `uv run`/`uv sync` (project .venv) only.
NEVER `git push` / merge to a published branch.
OFFLINE ONLY in M4 — no chatgpt.com/CDP/browser legs. Production cdp path imports playwright lazily; offline tests never launch a browser nor call `playwright install`.
Stage ONLY explicit v2-core paths (NEVER `git add -A`). DO NOT stage issues/cdp-send-repro/controller.mjs (another agent editing it), team/state/live-state.json (team-lead's), or human/.
Do not touch human/, archive/, docs/ (read-only), git stashes. team/ is manager-owned; workers write ONLY their one named deliverable when told.
NEVER the Claude Agent tool. Workers = pi via pi-watch.sh; this manager = Claude Opus.

lead_decisions_applied.Q2_pending_stub: ACCEPT local:<client_send_id> stub (hidden/superseded in default reads), NOT a separate outbox file.
lead_decisions_applied.Q6_clipboard: fail-closed by default: backend fail + no faithful fallback -> stop HUMAN-ACTION-NEEDED; never auto-read clipboard. For M4 only the mock-tested fallback chain; clipboard itself is M5+.
lead_decisions_applied.Q1_projects: identity parsing for BOTH URL shapes (/c/<id> and /g/g-p-<projid>/c/<chatid>) IS in M4 scope; project send/create is M7.
lead_decisions_applied.other_open_qs: completion-status vocab, stream_status, attachment byte routes, send-rate defaults, memory budget, multi-part-join, profile verification -> conservative offline defaults; do NOT guess live values.

dispatch.mechanism: Claude parent (no bg_run tools) -> parent_claude_watch fallback: `bash .claude/skills/manager/references/launchers/parent-claude/pi-watch.sh --run-root .pi-workers --wait-seconds 0 [--tools LIST] "<prompt>"` launches detached; collect via `--watch <run-dir> --wait-seconds N`. status file = exit code; output.log = transcript; metadata.txt started_at = real start (not worker self-report).
dispatch.editor_tools: default read,grep,find,ls,edit,write,bash (single editor, surrounded by non-editing best-of-N).
dispatch.panel_tools: read,grep,find,ls,write (read-only lenses; no edit/bash so they cannot mutate source or git).
dispatch.no_abandon: after launch, persist run_dir here, then block-collect via bounded --watch loop; never yield a turn with a live child and no monitor.

ground_truth_verified.baseline_tests: `uv run pytest -q` => 4 passed in 0.01s (M1 scaffold smoke). This is the green baseline M4 builds on.
ground_truth_verified.tooling: pi, tmux, uv, jq present. .pi-workers/, __pycache__/, .venv, .pytest_cache gitignored.
ground_truth_verified.dirty_not_mine: issues/cdp-send-repro/controller.mjs (M), team/state/live-state.json (M, team-lead), human/ (untracked) — never stage.
